steps.title: Set the output
steps.content:
The function is $f(x)=7\sqrt{x}$, and the question asks when $f(x)=35$. So solve
$$
7\sqrt{x}=35
$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Divide by $7$, then square both sides:
$$
\sqrt{x}=5
$$
$$
x=25
$$

steps.title: Choose the input
steps.content: The value $25$ makes $7\sqrt{x}=35$. The answer is C.
